name: 破洞小世界 呆望窗  Hole Small World
short_description: Role-playing game, is a turn-based combat. The game has little content. There are some novel things in this game. If you have any illness, please do not purchase this game, as the images or sounds in it may cause you discomfort.
detailed_description:
This is a little creative game.

There are some fantastical scenes in the game, and some of these scenes are not complete, they are like one broken little world after another.

The game has little content, the monster is stronger.

Story is short, some NPC in dialogue with players without picture shows.

The game is turn-based battle.

Use a lot of free stuff in the game, such as modify map sample.

There are many repeat the monsters in the game.

There may be some design is not reasonable in the game, there is some authors did not expect, I am very sorry.

If you have any illness, please do not purchase this game, as the images or sounds in it may cause you discomfort.

Notification

1. This game was made by me using RPG MAKER MZ. RPG MAKER MZ rights logo: 「©Gotcha Gotcha Games Inc./YOJI OJIMA 2020」

2. It is prohibited to extract programs and materials from this game for distribution.

3. It is forbidden to extract and modify material from the game.

4. It is forbidden to extract materials from this game for self-made games.
